title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.391 - Gene Curtis Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Highway 80 in New Madrid County
text:
227.391.  Gene Curtis Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Highway 80 in New Madrid County. — The portion of Highway 80 in New Madrid County from the intersection of Highways 61, 80, and H, east to Interstate 55 shall be designated the "Gene Curtis Memorial Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donation.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1941)
